---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
toc: true
---

[Download CV as PDF](cv/cv.pdf){.btn .btn-primary}

Last updated: May 2026

---

## Education

**PhD in Fluid Mechanics** — University of Sevilla  
*2021 – present*  
Thesis: *Dynamical Analysis of Collapsible Channels* 

Supervisors:  Prof. [Miguel Ángel Herrada Gutierrez](https://edwww.us.es/trabaja-en-la-us/directorio/miguel-angel-herrada-gutierrez), Prof. [Alfonso Miguel Gañán Calvo](https://edwww.us.es/trabaja-en-la-us/directorio/alfonso-miguel-ganan-calvo)

**MSc in Physics and Mathematics** — University of Granada  
*2020 – 2022*  
Thesis: *Modulation of S-waves in an elastic medium: slow-variable approximation and characterization of the amplitude through a nonlinear Schrödinger equation*

**BSc in Physics** — University Complutense of Madrid  
*2014– 2019*


## Research experience

**Doctoral Researcher** — University of Sevilla Lab Name  
*2022 – 2026*  
Numerical modelling of collapsible channels and tubes using [JaM](https://miguelherrada.github.io/JAM/index.html)

**Visiting Student** — University of Manchester
*Summer 2025*  
Worked on modelling of wrinkles and drapes on elastic disks using [oomph-lib](https://oomph-lib.github.io/oomph-lib/doc/html/index.html)

## Skills

**Programming:** MATLAB, Julia, Fortran (basic), C++ (basic)

**Visualization:** ParaView  

**Other:** LaTeX, Git, Linux


## Languages

- Spanish — Native
- English — Fluent 
- French — Basic 


## Publications

See the [Research](research.qmd) page for a complete list.


## Awards & Grants

- **2022** — PhD fellowship, [Agencia Estatal de Investigación](https://www.aei.gob.es/convocatorias/buscador-convocatorias/ayudas-contratos-predoctorales-formacion-doctores-2020-2)
